args.code: (() => { const branchText = document.evaluate("//button[contains(text(), 'vercel')]", document, null, XPathResult.FIRST_ORDERED_NODE_TYPE, null).singleNodeValue; if (branchText) { branchText.click(); return 'clicked branch btn'; } const el = document.querySelector('[data-testid=branch-selector], [role=combobox], select'); if (el) { el.click(); return 'clicked selector ' + el.tagName; } return 'not found'; })()
